'''ARC casters''' were modified [[E-11 blaster rifle/Legends|E-11 blaster rifles]] that unleashed powerful electric shocks that could disable electronics, and boil organic beings from the inside out. They were utilized by [[Phase Zero dark trooper|Phase Zero Dark Troopers]], [[Phase II Dark Trooper/Legends|Phase II Dark Troopers]], and the [[Emperor's Royal Guard/Legends|Emperor's Royal Guard]] deployed by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Imperial Army/Legends|Army]]. [[X1]], a [[Dark side adept/Legends|Dark Side Adept]], also employed this in his career.

==Description==
[[File:X1X2_Duel-over-Mustafar.jpg|thumb|left|240px|A Royal Guard uses an ARC caster against [[X2]].]]
The weapon used a charge function to prepare a torrent of electricity at the target which, when fully charged, could affect up to four other targets. This type of weapon was similar to the [["DN bolt caster" plasma disruptor|plasma disruptors]] originally used by dismounted [[Clone trooper pilot/Legends|clone pilots]] as a personal weapon. The weapon shooting an electric shock would severely damage the wiring and systems of [[Droid/Legends|droid]] opponents. These weapons were named for their ability to "arc" from one target to another.
